docs.title: API Docs

docs.text: News/Events API Status codes 200 OK Successful request 404 Not Found No such object 500 Internal Server Error Something went wrong 503 Service Unavailable Service is down (maybe for maintenance) Localization Localization is defined in each request with query param or URL param. Accepted values are: de - Deutsch en - English fr - Français The fallback language handling should be implemented in the CMS API. Date and datetime do not rely on localization and are always returned in standard format. Query Params All GET endpoints which return a list support offset based pagination, startAt / endAt and uuids filters. Arguments Parameter Description limit int optional Maximal number of elements per query. Min: 1. offset int optional Current offset. Default is 0 which is the first element. Must be >= 0. startAt string optional The date start filter. e.g. "2022-10-06" endAt string optional The date end filter. e.g. "2022-10-30" uuids* string[] The uuids of the newscontainers. e.g. ["fb3f47eb-f2d3-4889-ae48-c72f24b7900c", "581e2cf8-fe7f-4e72-898d-92512d9596f0"] Example Request $ curl https://announcement-api.unibe.ch/events?limit=10&offset=2&startAt=2022-10-06&endAt=2022-10-30&uuids=fb3f47eb-f2d3-4889-ae48-c72f24b7900c&uuids=581e2cf8-fe7f-4e72-898d-92512d9596f0 Example Response { "offset": 5, "limit": 10, "total": 20, "data": [ //... ] } Fields TIMESTAMPS All timestamp are returned in ISO8601 format in UTC with fields ending in postfix At . Example: "publishedAt": "2015-07-01T00:55:47Z" Categories Category resource Field Description id string Category ID title string Category title link string Link to category on unibe.ch site subCategories [Category], optional Sub categories of category Get categories for news HTTP REQUEST GET /v2/announcements/categories/news Example response (200) { "id": "581e2cf8-fe7f-4e72-898d-92512d9596f0", "title": "Portal", "link": "https://www.unibe.ch/unibe/portal/content/e681", "subCategories": [ { "id": "cba8131b-1c7d-4992-82c5-ddfb283fd854", "title": "Theologische Fakultät", "link": "https://www.theol.unibe.ch/unibe/portal/fak_theologie/content/e650015", "subCategories": [ //... ] }, [ //... ] ] } Get categories for events HTTP REQUEST GET /v2/announcements/categories/events Example response (200) { "id": "581e2cf8-fe7f-4e72-898d-92512d9596f0", "title": "Agenda", "link": "https://agenda.unibe.ch", "subCategories": [ { "id": "cba8131b-1c7d-4992-82c5-ddfb283fd854", "title": "Theologische Fakultät", "link": "https://www.theol.unibe.ch/unibe/portal/fak_theologie/content/e650015", "subCategories": [ //... ] }, [ //... ] ] } News & Events News resource Field Description title string News title imageUrl string, optional News cover image publishedAt timestamp Publish date link string Link to news item categoryLink string Link to the category of news item content string Content of news item EventExtraInfo resource Field Description building string, optional Building where event may happen. location string, optional Address of event room string, optional Room of event speakers string, optional Speakers of event Event resource Field Description title string Event title imageUrl string, optional Event cover image startAt timestamp Start date endAt timestamp End date extraInfo EventExtraInfo More information about the event link string Link to event categoryLink string Link to the category of event topic string, optional Topic of event item Get news of categories HTTP REQUEST GET /v2/announcements/news ARGUMENTS Parameter Type Required Description categories [string] Required Array of category ids (UUIDs) publishedBeforAt timestamp Required Show news published before this timestamp Arguments for pagination apply too! Example response (200) { "offset": 5, "limit": 10, "total": 20, "data": [ { "title": "Wartungsarbeiten der Webseiten der UB Bern", "image_url": "https://www.unibe.ch/unibe/portal/content/e681/e1087345/ub_alert1_ger.jpg", "published_at": "2021-06-09T15:34:42+02:00", "link": "https://www.unibe.ch/universitaet/dienstleistungen/universitaetsbibliothek/index_ger.html", "category_link": "https://www.unibe.ch/unibe/portal/content/e681", "content": "Wegen Wartungsarbeiten am Dienstag, 15.06.2021 von 7:00 bis 9:00 können die Webseiten der Universitätsbibliothek Bern in diesem Zeitfenster kurzzeitig nicht erreichbar sein." } //... ] } Get events of categories HTTP REQUEST GET /v2/announcements/events ARGUMENTS Parameter Type Required Description categories [string] Required Array of category ids (UUIDs) startAfterAt timestamp Required Show events after this timestamp Arguments for pagination apply too! Example response (200) { "offset": 5, "limit": 10, "total": 20, "data": [ { "title": "MIC Research Day 2021", "image_url": "https://www.unibe.ch/unibe/portal/content/e681/e1087345/ub_alert1_ger.jpg", "start_at": "2021-07-07T12:00", "end_at": "2021-07-07T18:00", "extra_info": { "building": "UniS, Schanzeneckstrasse 1", "location": "3012 Bern", "room": "Vorlesungsraum S003" }, "link": "https://www.mic.unibe.ch…ts/mic_research_day_2021", "category_link": "https://agenda.unibe.ch", "topic": "Event – Microscopy Imaging Center" } //... ] }

docs.text: 200 OK Successful request 404 Not Found No such object 500 Internal Server Error Something went wrong 503 Service Unavailable Service is down (maybe for maintenance)
docs.title: Status codes

docs.text: Localization is defined in each request with query param or URL param. Accepted values are: de - Deutsch en - English fr - Français The fallback language handling should be implemented in the CMS API. Date and datetime do not rely on localization and are always returned in standard format.
docs.title: Localization

docs.text: All GET endpoints which return a list support offset based pagination, startAt / endAt and uuids filters.
docs.title: Query Params

docs.text: Parameter Description limit int optional Maximal number of elements per query. Min: 1. offset int optional Current offset. Default is 0 which is the first element. Must be >= 0. startAt string optional The date start filter. e.g. "2022-10-06" endAt string optional The date end filter. e.g. "2022-10-30" uuids* string[] The uuids of the newscontainers. e.g. ["fb3f47eb-f2d3-4889-ae48-c72f24b7900c", "581e2cf8-fe7f-4e72-898d-92512d9596f0"]
docs.title: Arguments

docs.text: $ curl https://announcement-api.unibe.ch/events?limit=10&offset=2&startAt=2022-10-06&endAt=2022-10-30&uuids=fb3f47eb-f2d3-4889-ae48-c72f24b7900c&uuids=581e2cf8-fe7f-4e72-898d-92512d9596f0
docs.title: Example Request

docs.text: { "offset": 5, "limit": 10, "total": 20, "data": [ //... ] }
docs.title: Example Response
